law the skin is the boundary вЂ” the largest organ, a selectively-permeable barrier (permit the sanctioned, block the threat: the sandbox), continuously regenerated from seed (~28-day renewal, it heals), holding the interior to its setpoint by negative feedback (homeostasis); it is the self/non-self membrane.
